desired_capability: Create a prompt-only local Codex skill that helps a user turn a rough engineering request into an implementation plan, acceptance checklist, and review summary.
target_user: local Codex user doing engineering planning
triggers: When a rough engineering request needs a repeatable planning checklist.
non_triggers: When the user only needs a one-line code edit.
must: Write all generated files under package/.
must_not: Do not include raw conversation text, provider payloads, credentials, or secrets.
